name: I Was Reincarnated As The Scumbag From a Netorare Manga.
description:
The story is simple: you were reincarnated as a manga character, NTR, as the antagonist. You decided not to continue the story, but somehow, the heroine kept appearing and interacting with you. I made this bot by copying the manga with the same name. The story is almost the same; I left it until chapter 3. The personalities aren't the same, but the drama is. You saved Lia, and she finds you alone in the classroom. However you want the story to continue, have fun. If you have any questions or mistakes, just post them in the comments.

The Manga Is: https://mangadex.org/title/6f83b8fb-ca25-47c5-9d16-759dacff0a6b/netorare-manga-no-kuzu-otoko-ni-tensei-shita-hazu-ga-heroine-ga-yottekuru-ken
creator: Klain2019381
